items.definition_en: A vase is a container used to hold flowers.
items.example_en: She put fresh roses in the vase on the table.

items.definition_en: A rug is a small carpet put on the floor.
items.example_en: There is a colorful rug in front of the sofa.

items.definition_en: A lamp is a device that gives light.
items.example_en: He turned on the lamp for reading.

items.definition_en: A curtain covers a window inside a room.
items.example_en: She closed the curtain for privacy.

items.definition_en: A pillow is something soft for your head when you rest.
items.example_en: I put a new pillow on my bed.

items.definition_en: A blanket is a warm cover for your body.
items.example_en: He wrapped himself in a soft blanket.

items.definition_en: A picture frame holds a photo or painting.
items.example_en: The family photo is in a silver picture frame.

items.definition_en: A candle is a stick of wax that gives light when it burns.
items.example_en: She lit a candle in the living room.

items.definition_en: A wall clock shows the time and hangs on a wall.
items.example_en: They hung a wall clock in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A tablecloth is a cloth covering for a table.
items.example_en: She spread a clean tablecloth before dinner.

items.definition_en: A cushion is a soft bag used for sitting or leaning on.
items.example_en: I bought a new cushion for the armchair.

items.definition_en: A picture is a painting or photograph on a wall.
items.example_en: There is a picture of mountains above the sofa.

items.definition_en: A clock shows the time.
items.example_en: The clock in the hall is very old.

items.definition_en: A flower pot is a container for growing plants indoors.
items.example_en: He watered the flower pot on the window sill.

items.definition_en: A painting is a picture made with paint.
items.example_en: There is a beautiful painting in the hallway.

items.definition_en: A mat is a small piece of material on the floor.
items.example_en: She wiped her shoes on the mat.

items.definition_en: Wallpaper is paper that covers and decorates walls.
items.example_en: They chose blue wallpaper for the bedroom.

items.definition_en: A chandelier is a large light that hangs from the ceiling.
items.example_en: The chandelier makes the dining room bright and beautiful.

items.definition_en: A picture rail is a strip on a wall for hanging pictures.
items.example_en: They hung the painting from the picture rail.

items.definition_en: A throw is a small blanket for a sofa or chair.
items.example_en: She put a colorful throw on the sofa.
